news_title: Aeries Technology Announces Major Enterprise Client Expansion, Projected to Reach $12M+ Annualized Run-Rate by Fiscal Year-End
summary: Aeries Technology (NASDAQ: AERT), a provider of AI-powered business transformation and Global Capability Center services, has announced a significant expansion of its engagement with a recent global enterprise client. The expanded relationship is projected to reach anannualized revenue run-rate exceeding $12 millionby March 2026.The client is expanding its use of Aeries' delivery platform across multiple functions includingartificial intelligence, technology services, finance, and customer support, utilizing delivery hubs in India and Mexico. This expansion aligns with Aeries' previously announced plans to add500 full-time employeesacross these locations to meet growing demand.
